Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Automatic Stay And For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ROGER T. RITTER, ESQUIRE (ADLER LAW FIRM, 415.433.5333) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY.
JIM EIMERS, ESQUIRE (707.568.2750) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS AND OPPOSING PARTIES VIRGINIA SIEGEL AND ZULEMA GARCIA.

RULING: A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF HANSON BRIDGETT MARCUS VLAHOS & RUDY LLP'S Motion For Relief From Automatic Stay IS DENIED AND THE MOTION For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO EXPLAIN THE NEED TO LIFT THE STAY IN ITS MOVING PAPERS. BY INCLUDING THE ATTACHMENT ARGUMENT IN THE REPLY, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT GIVEN THE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND. ALSO IT IS NOT CLEAR THERE IS A BASIS FOR AN ATTACHMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 (301/PJM/PM)
